title: Shogun's Blast - Undead & TNT
description: Explore haunted Japanese villages, battle explosive Oni Warlords, and defeat the Council of Leaders in this immersive RPG structure and combat mod.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GyrKkBU51Y0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
![Shogun's Blast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff44a4a445c041e73091c9879b313f7156c7c59e_0.webp)

Shogun's Blast — Japanese Zombie Structures & TNT Bosses
Prepare to face an ancient curse in the heart of a haunted Japanese landscape. Shogun's Blast transforms your world into a high-stakes battlefield where serene Sakura forests hide a relentless undead army and devastating explosive power.

![Media & Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83097a2f15c37ae033cad40da5a533576264da64_0.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03385e6c706293ac645cf6ab16690c0cc90c1fc5.jpeg)
![1.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6c2d8a79fa992329c08e2b0b0279a055aee5ac4_0.webp)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084c45235966a263f6e1b3db5cc723fe9f8362e4.jpeg)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f519aa5e181e74bff6b7f1554ec963d589e3f27b.jpeg)
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98896579cb93c1ea9b2b67ac660fbde9fdd7b76b.jpeg)
![Core Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5fa571c9b3ed77a9049fcd895262be3aa1d5b6a_0.webp)

- 🏯 **Ancient Haunted Provinces**: Explore vast, atmospheric Japanese villages featuring custom architecture, mossy estates, and Torii gates.

- 👺 **The Great Shrine**: A sacred and dangerous structure at the village center, housing the throne room and the mod’s most prestigious treasures.

- 💣**The Oni Warlord**: A terrifying, sound-sensitive entity. If you run, he will find you. His presence is announced by a multi-stage explosion that leaves nothing but destruction.

- ⚔️ **The Endless Undead Legion**: Zombie Soldiers haunt the village streets and will continue to spawn indefinitely. Their numbers are limitless until you strike at the source.

- 👑 **The Duel of the Shrine**: Once you step into the Shrine's perimeter, it becomes a pure combat arena. The village forces will not interfere, leaving you in a life-or-death struggle against the Council of Leaders.

- ✨ **Divine Victory**: Defeating all five Leaders is the only way to break the curse. Once they fall, every remaining zombie in the village is instantly destroyed, and a victory celebration 
is broadcasted to all.

![Legendary Adversaries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5ae9301c76f29c5666b9dd3ff4536e385240cc_0.webp)

- **Oni Warlord**: A walking catastrophe that reacts to your footsteps. Only the quietest players can escape his devastating blast.

- **Zombie Soldiers**: Highly organized ranks including Swordsmen, Axemen, Spearmen, Archers, and Crossbowmen. They guard the village relentlessly as long as their masters live.

- **The Council of Leaders**: The ultimate challenge. Five distinct bosses—Leader - Swordsman, Leader - Axeman, Leader - Spearman, Leader - Archer, and Leader - Crossbowman—await you within the Shrine, equipped with enchanted Netherite gear.

![Explosives & Artifacts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd7d588041595dabfd31893c40eca2580a1781a_0.webp)

- **Warhead TNT**: A metallic, reinforced explosive with immense power and custom audio cues, far superior to standard TNT.

- **Soul Gunpowder**: A rare and volatile ingredient dropped by Oni Warlords, essential for crafting high-tier destructive items.

- **Shrine Loot**: The ultimate reward hidden behind the throne. These chests can only be claimed once the Council has been defeated.

![Exploration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e0354cadbc5ee96a244ea5c2107f76430c92f7c_0.webp)

Discover grand settlements surrounded by bamboo groves and stone lanterns. If you find yourself lost, local Cartographers can provide specialized maps to lead you directly to these hidden Japanese provinces.

![Credits & License](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/968d1f1c10fa4c437066cb5e00afe4bbf9d258f9_0.webp)
